Adult Drake.name: 成年龙兽 Adult Drake
Adult Drake.description:
完全长成的龙兽，是危险的潜行猎手和群猎者。

Fully grown drakes which are dangerous stalkers and pack hunters.

Archer.name: 弓箭手 Archer
Archer.description:
接受过训练的远程战斗者会使用弓。
Ranged combatants with training is the use of bows.

Bard.name: 吟游诗人 Bard
Bard.description:
你研习英雄叙事的口述与音乐传统，以此激发盟友的勇气、打击敌人的士气，并迅速以非传统方式解决问题。

You practice the oral and musical traditions of heroic storytelling to inspire courage in your allies, demoralize your foes, and be quick with unconventional solutions to problems.

Berserker.name: 狂战士 Berserker
Berserker.description:
一名由狂怒驱动、偏好使用重型武器进行双手攻击的战士。
A rage-fueled warrior which prefers two-handed attacks using Heavy weapons.

Brigand.name: 强盗 Brigand
Brigand.description:
无论是强盗、海盗、恶棍还是其他无赖，皆为邪恶的违法之徒。

Villainous lawbreakers whether they be bandits, pirates, ruffians, or other knaves.

Burrower.name: 掘穴者 Burrower
Burrower.description:
擅长在坚实物质中掘穴穿行的野兽或类野兽生物。

Beasts or beast-like creatures which are expert at burrowing through solid material.

Chomper.name: 碎咬兽 Chomper
Chomper.description:
依靠巨大口部凶狠啃咬的野兽。

Beasts that rely on vicious bites from their oversized mouths.

Commonfolk.name: 平民百姓 Commonfolk
Commonfolk.description:
世界上没有特殊冒险技能或能力的普通公民。

Ordinary citizens of the world who have no exceptional adventuring skills or abilities.

Drakeling.name: 幼龙兽 Drakeling
Drakeling.description:
体型较小或较年轻的龙兽，个体尺寸偏小，但作为成群狩猎的潜猎者依然危险。

Smaller or younger drakes which are individually undersized, but dangerous as stalkers who hunt in packs.

Elemental Mote.name: 元素微粒 Elemental Mote
Elemental Mote.description:
微灵是仍具有实体形态的最小元素化身。它们通常没有智能，会根据环境刺激行动，或遵循附近更强大元素生物的本能指引。

Motes are the smallest elemental embodiments that still take physical form. They are generally unintelligent and act according to environmental stimuli or following the instinctual direction of a nearby greater elemental.

Elemental Sprite.name: 元素精灵 Elemental Sprite
Elemental Sprite.description:
小精灵是低等元素生物，是其原始元素的化身，但缺乏其高等同类所具备的智慧。

Sprites are lesser elementals which are embodiments of their raw element, but lack the sapience of their greater kin.

Elemental Visitor.name: 元素访客 Elemental Visitor
Elemental Visitor.description:
访客是原始元素能量的具现化，会呈现出大致具有人型生物轮廓的形态。与它们较低阶的同类不同，元素访客具备沟通与理解的能力，尽管它们的动机很少与凡人的动机一致。

Visitors are embodiments of raw elemental energy that assume forms that are vaguely humanoid in shape. Unlike their lesser kin, Elemental Visitors are are capable of communication and understanding, although their motivations are seldom aligned with those of mortals.

Elemental Wanderer.name: 元素漫游者 Elemental Wanderer
Elemental Wanderer.description:
流浪者是元素能量的重要显化，会呈现出一种令人敬畏或庄严雄伟的形态。它们具有自我意识与智慧，并且明白当自己身处其典型领域之外时，便是不自然的闯入者。它们往往受某种本能或预先谋划的目的驱使，而正是这种目的将它们引至此处。

Wanderers are significant manifestations of elemental energy that assume a form that is imposing or majestic. They are self-aware, sapient, and understand that they unnatural interlopers when outside of their typical realm. They are often driven by some instinctive or premeditated purpose which has drawn them forth.

Fighter.name: 战士 Fighter
Fighter.description:
坚韧的近战战士，擅长运用单手武器、盾牌和重型护甲。
Hardened melee combatants expert at weilding one-handed weaponry, shield, and heavy armor.

Grappler.name: 擒抱者 Grappler
Grappler.description:
专精于以身体手段制住对手，并使其更容易受到后续攻击的战士。
Fighters who specialize in physically restraining their adversaries and rendering them susceptible to further attacks.

Guardian Beast.name: 守护野兽 Guardian Beast
Guardian Beast.description:
作为守卫的野兽，守望着某些地点或人，它们对其忠贞不渝。

Beasts that serve as guardians, standing watch over places or people to whom they are unwaveringly loyal.

Justiciar.name: 审判官 Justiciar
Justiciar.description:
审判官是神圣的勇士，他们将神力的愤怒与审判带给邪恶或不配之人。

Justiciars are divine champions which bring the wrath and judgment of divine power to those who are wicked or unworthy.

Lawkeeper.name: 律法守卫 Lawkeeper
Lawkeeper.description:
负责维持治安并追捕破坏治安者的警员、侦探、调查员以及其他执法人员。

Constables, detectives, investigators, and other officers of the law who are responsible for keeping the peace and hunting down those who break it.

Mage.name: 法师 Mage
Mage.description:
一名在战斗中操纵火焰与电流的施法者。
A magic user which wields flame and electricity in battle.

Necromancer.name: 死灵法师 Necromancer
Necromancer.description:
死灵法师是施法者，他们将自己的才智与智慧用于消解死亡终结性的研究，钻研徘徊于生命与湮灭之间的死灵与心灵力量。他们很少独自出现——任何威胁等级的死灵法师都会将附近的不死生物纳入自己的意志之下，若不先扰乱其召唤出的仆从就想击败他们，往往代价高昂。在正面交锋中，他们的身体十分脆弱，闪避较低，也没有像样的招架或格挡；但他们能够维持持续性的死灵效果，削弱敌人的专注与士气，并从他人的痛苦中补充自己的资源，这使他们在任何等级都是危险的对手。

Necromancers are spellcasters who have turned their intellect and wisdom toward the unmaking of death's finality, studying the necrotic and psychic forces that linger between life and oblivion. They are rarely found alone - a Necromancer of any threat rank will have bent nearby undead to their will, and defeating one without first disrupting their conjured servants is a costly proposition. In direct confrontation they are physically fragile, with low dodge and no meaningful parry or block, but their ability to sustain ongoing necrotic effects, sap the focus and morale of their enemies, and replenish their own resources from the suffering of others makes them dangerous adversaries at any level.

Occultist.name: 秘学家 Occultist
Occultist.description:
运用异界与诡秘力量进行施法的魔法使用者。
Magic users who practice spellcraft using otherworldly and eldritch forces.

Operator.name: 操作者 Operator
Operator.description:
操作者是能够在紧张局势中周旋的专家，善于将敏锐的政治判断力与机敏和果断行动相结合。

Operators are experts at maneuvering in tense situations, able to balance shrewd political sense with cunning and decisive action.

Pack Member.name: 群体成员 Pack Member
Pack Member.description:
成群猎食的野兽。
Beasts that hunt in packs.

Priest.name: 牧师 Priest
Priest.description:
虔诚侍奉诸神之人，他们通过对神祇的信仰与奉献获得力量。

Devout servants of the gods who derive their power through their faith and devotion to their deity.

Protector.name: 守护者 Protector
Protector.description:
坚毅的战士们挺身挡在盟友与危险之间，首要目标是保护自己和他人免受伤害。

Stalwart warriors who interpose themselves between their allies and peril, seeking foremost to protect themselves and others from harm.

Scout.name: 侦察兵 Scout
Scout.description:
受过侦察与未知区域前期探索训练的人员。

Individuals trained in reconnaissance and advance exploration of unknown areas.

Servitor.name: 仆从 Servitor
Servitor.description:
专门从事间谍活动或在控制其的大师远程指挥下执行任务的生物。

Creatures which are specialized in espionage or performing tasks in remote service of a controlling master.

Shapeshifter.name: 变形者 Shapeshifter
Shapeshifter.description:
变形者修习兽性变形之术，这是一种古老的原始魔法，与通常修习的符文施法不同。

Shapeshifters practice the arts of bestial transformation, a type of primal magic that is ancient and different than commonly practiced runic spellcraft.

Skirmisher.name: 散兵 Skirmisher
Skirmisher.description:
一名不屈不挠且意志坚定的近战战斗者，运用敏捷与力量的结合来制服敌人。
A relentless and determined melee combatant that uses a mix of agility and power to subdue foes.

Spellblade.name: 咒刃 Spellblade
Spellblade.description:
咒刃是受到魔法强化的战士，他们将施法融入武器攻击之中，制造出毁灭性的打击。

Spellblades are magically empowered warriors who weave spellcraft into their weapon attacks to create devastating strikes.

Swashbuckler.name: 侠客 Swashbuckler
Swashbuckler.description:
你过着帆船上的危险生活，或以公海海盗为业。你以机智、魅力，以及有时不计后果的勇敢而闻名。

Those who engage in the dangerous life aboard a sailing ship, or practice the trade of high seas piracy. You are known for your wit, charm, and sometimes reckless bravery.

Thief.name: 盗贼 Thief
Thief.description:
擅长潜入他们不该进入的区域，并拿走他们不该拥有之物的流氓式角色。

Rogueish characters who are adept in infiltrating areas they are not supposed to enter and taking things they are not supposed to have.

Trader.name: 商人 Trader
Trader.description:
你的专长在于游历世界，并促成货物的交换。

Your expertise is in traveling the world and facilitating the exchange of goods.

Tusker.name: 长牙兽 Tusker
Tusker.description:
凭借自身的体型、冲势与锐利獠牙作战的野兽。

Beasts that fight using their own mass, momentum, and sharpened tusks.

Ultra Drake.name: 究极龙兽 Ultra Drake
Ultra Drake.description:
已经成熟、位于其同类食物链顶端的龙兽。

Mature drakes who are the apex predators of their kind.
